# Allocator API Module

<!-- Generated by tools/generate-python-reference-pages.py -->

The allocator is the control-plane service that stores managed MAC and explicit IPv6 ownership in PostgreSQL, exposes the external HTTP API, and forwards apply and move work into the node-agent batching pipeline.

## Source Module

- Source file: [`net-identity-allocator/app.py`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py)
- Mirrored module for MkDocs: `docs_api.allocator_app`
Companion deep-dive docs:

- [net-identity-allocator.md](../../net-identity-allocator.md)
- [explicit-ipv6-apply-move-pipeline.md](../../explicit-ipv6-apply-move-pipeline.md)
- [explicit-ipv6-parallelism.md](../../explicit-ipv6-parallelism.md)

## HTTP Endpoints

These are the route checks implemented by the module's HTTP handler class.

| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| POST | `/admin/reset` | [`do_POST`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L2493) | 2493 |

## Key Architecture Entry Points

| Symbol | Kind | Line | Why It Matters |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`dispatch_explicit_ipv6_apply`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L884) `(assignment, previous_owner=None, trace_context=None)` | function | 884 | Decides whether an explicit request enters the apply or move batching path. |
| [`explicit_apply_batcher`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L703) `(assignment)` | function | 703 | Returns the per-node apply batcher used to collapse bursts of explicit apply work. |
| [`explicit_move_batcher`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L727) `(assignment, previous_owner=None)` | function | 727 | Returns the per-node move batcher used to collapse bursts of explicit move work. |
| [`apply_explicit_ipv6_batch_on_node`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L794) `(items)` | function | 794 | Builds and sends allocator-side bulk-apply requests to the node agent. |
| [`apply_explicit_ipv6_move_batch_on_node`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L840) `(items)` | function | 840 | Builds and sends allocator-side bulk-move requests to the node agent. |
| [`run_explicit_ipv6_apply_batch_task`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L1043) `(items)` | function | 1043 | Worker entry point for asynchronous explicit apply batches. |
| [`run_explicit_ipv6_move_batch_task`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L1179) `(items)` | function | 1179 | Worker entry point for asynchronous explicit move batches. |
| [`Store`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L1282) | class | 1282 | Owns PostgreSQL access and the persistent managed-MAC / explicit-IPv6 records. |
| [`Handler`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L2378) | class | 2378 | Implements the allocator HTTP endpoints. |
| [`main`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/net-identity-allocator/app.py#L2544) `()` | function | 2544 | Starts the allocator HTTP service. |

## Mental Model By Concern

These groups are ordered to make the module easier to learn from left to right: input and helpers first, state and batching next, then the outer HTTP or runtime surface.

Canonical helpers that normalize MAC and IPv6 fields and derive the deterministic explicit identities used by the rest of the system.
